sharc
Documentation développeur
PackageFile.cs
1 using System;
2 using System.Collections.Generic;
3 using System.Text;
4 
5 namespace XmlToCMake
6 {
7  public class CompilerOptions
8  {
9  public CompilerOptions(List<String> includes, List<String> defines, String option_mark)
10  {
11  this.Includes = includes;
12  this.Defines = defines;
13 
14  StringBuilder flags_buffer = new StringBuilder();
15  Includes.ForEach(delegate(string s) { flags_buffer.AppendFormat("{2}I{0}\"{1}{0}\" ", @"\", s, option_mark); });
16  Defines.ForEach(delegate(string s) { flags_buffer.AppendFormat("{2}D{0}\"{1}{0}\" ", @"\", s, option_mark); });
17  this.Flags = flags_buffer.ToString();
18  }
19  public List<string> Includes { get; private set; }
20  public List<string> Defines { get; private set; }
21  public String Flags { get; private set; }
22  };
23 
24  public sealed class PackageFile
25  {
26  public PackageFile(string name, List<String> includes, List<String> libraries, List<String> library_paths, List<String> flags)
27  {
28  this.Name = name;
29  this.Includes = includes;
30 
31  // new version which skips optimized - debug sequence (which produces warning in CMake)
32  this.Libraries = new List<String>();
33  String last = null;
34  foreach(String s in libraries)
35  {
36  if (last == null) { last = s; }
37  else if (last == "optimized" && s == "debug") { last = null; }
38  else {
39  this.Libraries.Add(last);
40  last = s;
41  }
42  }
43  if (last != null) this.Libraries.Add(last);
44 
45  this.LibraryPaths = library_paths;
46  this.Flags = flags;
47  }
48 
49  public string Name { get; private set; }
50  public List<string> Libraries { get; private set; }
51  public List<string> LibraryPaths { get; private set; }
52  private List<string> Flags;
53  private List<string> Includes;
54 
55  public CompilerOptions CompileFlags()
56  {
57  List<String> define_list = new List<string>();
58  List<String> include_list = new List<string>();
59 
60  this.Includes.ForEach(delegate(string s) {
61  if (s.StartsWith("-I") || s.StartsWith("/I"))
62  {
63  include_list.Add(s.Substring(2, s.Length - 2));
64  // Console.WriteLine("Include : {0}", s.Substring(2, s.Length - 2));
65  }
66  else
67  {
68  include_list.Add(s);
69  // Console.WriteLine("Include : {0}", s);
70  }
71  } );
72 
73  this.Flags.ForEach(delegate(string s) {
74  if (s.StartsWith("-D") || s.StartsWith("/D"))
75  {
76  define_list.Add(s.Substring(2, s.Length - 2));
77  // Console.WriteLine("Compile flags : {0}", s.Substring(2, s.Length - 2));
78  }
79  else if (s.StartsWith("-I") || s.StartsWith("/I"))
80  {
81  include_list.Add(s.Substring(2, s.Length - 2));
82  // Console.WriteLine("Include : {0}", s.Substring(2, s.Length - 2));
83  }
84  else if (s.StartsWith("-") || s.StartsWith("/"))
85  {
86  Console.Error.WriteLine("ERROR: Unknown flag '{0}' found in package '{1}'\n", s, Name);
87  Environment.Exit(-1);
88  }
89  else 
90  {
91  define_list.Add(s);
92  }
93  });
94 
95  switch(Environment.OSVersion.Platform)
96  {
97  case System.PlatformID.Unix:
98  return new CompilerOptions(include_list, define_list, "-");
99  case System.PlatformID.Win32NT:
100  case System.PlatformID.Win32Windows:
101  return new CompilerOptions(include_list, define_list, "/");
102  default:
103  Console.Error.WriteLine("ERROR: Unknown plaform '{0}' : cannot generate platform options\n", Environment.OSVersion.Platform);
104  Environment.Exit(-1);
105  return null;
106  }
107  }
108  }
109 }
